sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Potion System
special_mechanics.description: Chakan can collect potions in each of the four elements which can be combined and used to give temporary buffs such as enhancing swords with elemental powers or increasing jump height

special_mechanics.name: Grappling Hook
special_mechanics.description: Weapon that allows Chakan to latch on to hooks and climb

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Chakan starts with twin swords and acquires new weapons (Hammer, Grappling Hook) in first stage of each element plane

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources document gameplay mechanics, weapon systems, and difficulty design philosophy but contain no quantified movement parameters, physics values, or sub-pixel system details. Game designed to convey 'pain and futility' through challenging platforming and non-linear progression with death penalties.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Chakan: The Forever Man (Gameplay and Development sections)
